description_long: This object resembles a large, irregularly shaped stone structure with a weathered, natural appearance, covered in patches of green moss and surrounded by grassy terrain. The main body consists of a prominent, flat-topped boulder resting atop several upright stones, creating a sheltered cavity beneath. The surface is rough and uneven, with visible cracks and color variations ranging from pale gray to muted blue and green. A smaller, detached stone lies nearby, suggesting a natural scattering of rocks. The moss and grass blend seamlessly into the base, giving the impression of an object integrated into a natural landscape. The overall form is reminiscent of ancient megalithic monuments or dolmens, with a strong sense of age and permanence.
description: A large, mossy stone structure with a flat boulder resting on upright rocks, surrounded by grassy terrain and a smaller detached stone.
description_view_0: From this angle, the flat-topped boulder and the upright supporting stones are clearly visible, with moss and grass covering the base and a small stone in the foreground.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side profile, showing the upright stones supporting the main boulder and more of the grassy terrain extending outward.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the sheltered cavity beneath the boulder and the spread of moss and grass around the base.
description_view_3: From this perspective, the overhanging boulder and the shadowed area beneath are prominent, with the grassy base extending to the left.
attribute_petal_arrangement: No visible petals; the structure is composed of overlapping, irregular stone slabs with no botanical petal arrangement.
